completed_tasks.name: Create GET /api/v1/audit-log endpoint with filtering and pagination
Build frontend audit-log page with filters, table, pagination, and payroll diff
Visual verification of audit log page
completed_tasks.progress: Awaiting human to run app and verify 12-step checklist

remaining_tasks.name: Visual verification of audit log page
checklist: Start backend: cd backend && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 31367 --reload
Start frontend: cd frontend && npm run dev -- -p 31368
Verify 'Audit-Log' with ClipboardList icon appears in sidebar
Click Audit-Log — verify page loads with heading and subtitle
Verify table columns: Zeitpunkt, Benutzer, Aktion, Entitat, Details
Create a shift via Dienste, return to Audit-Log — verify 'angelegt' row for 'Dienst' appears
Test entity type filter — select Dienst, verify only shift entries show
Test date range filter Von/Bis — verify results narrow
Find a 'geandert' row, click expand — verify before/after diff renders
Login as employee — confirm /audit-log is NOT in sidebar

blockers.description: Plan 03-03 Task 3 is a human-verify checkpoint requiring visual browser testing
blockers.workaround: None — must run app locally and verify manually

human_actions_pending.action: Run app locally and verify audit-log page via 12-step checklist
human_actions_pending.context: Plan 03-03 Task 3 is a blocking visual checkpoint. All automated tests (339 backend, 61 frontend) pass. The checkpoint requires a human to confirm layout, filters, pagination, diff expansion, and RBAC.

decisions.decision: audit_service.write() stages row without committing — caller owns transaction
decisions.rationale: Ensures audit rows roll back atomically with failed mutations (no orphan rows)

decisions.decision: PAYROLL_AUDIT_FIELDS = (actual_hours, base_wage, total_gross) captured as float before/after
decisions.rationale: AUDIT-03 requirement — payroll mutations must record specific field changes

decisions.decision: Alembic migration uses inspect() guard + dialect check for PostgreSQL REVOKE
decisions.rationale: Idempotency rule — must not fail on SQLite test environment or re-runs

next_action: User replies 'approved' to complete Task 3 checkpoint, then orchestrator spawns continuation agent to create SUMMARY.md, update STATE/ROADMAP, and trigger phase verification.
context_notes: Wave 1 (foundation) and Wave 2 (wiring) are fully committed to main.
